title: hiraea pachypoda
intro: Hiraea pachypoda, also known as the "pachypoda hiraea" or "tree hiraea", is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia and Fiji. The medicinal properties of Hiraea pachypoda include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. Hiraea pachypoda can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
